title: TealFire - Vanilla+
description: Vanilla with QoL Mods. Developed for TealFire Community Servers.
body:
# TealFire Vanilla+
Vanilla with quality of life mods.


This client-side only modpack aims to fullfill the vanilla experience of Minecraft without changing anything substantial.

> This modpack was developed for the TealFire community servers, but can be used on **some** other servers too
